tasks.title: Componentize CRM entity detail pages (Leads, Contacts) — extract shared SOLID-compliant components from 5284 lines of duplicated god-files; wire bypassed shared components (EntityHeader, SearchFilterBar, ActivityFeed); create cross-entity reusable components (EntityProfileCard, ActivityFilterBar, AiInsightMetricsGrid, ai-insight-transforms utility, EntityErrorState, EntityDetailSkeleton, ConfirmationDialog); reduce page files from 2691/2593 to ~200 lines each

tasks.title: Fix Compliance Calendar Seed Data — replace fabricated/stale events in compliance-calendar.json with realistic SaaS CRM compliance milestones; remove irrelevant ISO 14001 events; update 6 past events still marked scheduled to completed; extend date range through 2026-12 covering GDPR quarterly reviews, SOC 2 audit cycle, ISO 27001 surveillance, ISO 42001 certification path, OWASP assessments; update metadata version and lastUpdated
tasks.description: Fix Compliance Calendar Seed Data — replace fabricated/stale events in compliance-calendar.json with realistic SaaS CRM compliance milestones; remove irrelevant ISO 14001 events; update 6 past events still marked scheduled to completed; extend date range through 2026-12 covering GDPR quarterly reviews, SOC 2 audit cycle, ISO 27001 surveillance, ISO 42001 certification path, OWASP assessments; update metadata version and lastUpdated
tasks.summary: compliance-calendar.json has 22 events covering 4 standards (GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, OWASP); no ISO 14001; all past events status=completed; all future events status=scheduled; date range Oct 2025–Dec 2026;...
